response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to identify the performers (FuwaMoco) and the song, which contains 'je t'aime' repeatedly. 2. Performed a search for 'FuwaMoco je t'aime lyrics'. 3. The search identified the song as a cover of 'je t'aime ★ je t'aime' by Tommy february6. 4. Retrieved the original Japanese lyrics and an English translation from search results. 5. Mapped the scenes: 00:00-03:06 is the performance. 03:06-04:06 is the post-performance talk. 04:06-05:00 is the guest appearance and introduction.
response.global_summary: FuwaMoco performs a cover of the song 'je t'aime ★ je t'aime' by Tommy february6, followed by a conversation about the song and the introduction of guest performers Azuki and Akirose.

scenes.description: FuwaMoco performs the song 'je t'aime ★ je t'aime' on a decorated, colorful birthday stage. The lyrics and title are partially visible on-screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
movie posters line the street corner
i ’m so sick of this town already
you sigh back at me on your end of the call
“don’t cancel on me … ”
“ mon amour pour toi ”
nobody knows about the photo
i ’ve hidden inside my heart locket
i mean this love with all my heart
and god ’s noticed
je t'aime ★ je t'aime
i don’t wanna have dreams that won’t come true
but a romance is awakening
“ i love you ”
i draw on a crepe underneath my umbrella of love
and hear the sound of endless rain
je t'aime ★ je t'aime
i ’d love to see you even if it ’s only for 5 minutes
because i don’t want this to be an empty night
candy shops
and record stores
are so boring when you ’re not around !
lemme bet how this love will go
by flipping the coin
in my jacket pocket
god already knows
je t'aime ★ je t'aime
i don’t wanna be in love if it ’s just gonna be boring
before i know it , i ’m in over my head
“ this moment is everything ”
kiss me one more time
before my cafe au lait cools down
je t'aime ★ je t'aime
i ’ve locked up our story
de jour en jour …

mon amour …

scenes.description: FuwaMoco discusses the song they just performed and their birthday event. No vocal music is playing.
Guest performers Azuki and Akirose enter the stage and introduce themselves, followed by a group conversation. No vocal music is playing.
